PyCon 2025

Annual Python conference bringing together developers from around the world.

About PyCon 2025

PyCon 2025 is the premier annual conference for the Python programming community. Bringing together developers, data scientists, educators, and enthusiasts from around the globe, PyCon is the place to learn, connect, and celebrate the Python ecosystem.

🎤 Keynote Speakers

Hear from industry leaders and Python pioneers sharing insights on the latest trends and innovations.

🛠️ Hands-On Workshops

Participate in interactive workshops covering everything from web development to machine learning.

🤝 Networking

Connect with fellow developers, share experiences, and build lasting professional relationships.

📚 Learning Tracks

Choose from multiple tracks tailored to your experience level and interests.

Schedule

Day 1: Monday, May 12

  • 09:00 AM - 10:00 AM

    Opening Keynote: "The Future of Python"

  • 10:30 AM - 12:00 PM

    Workshop: Advanced Python Patterns

  • 01:00 PM - 02:30 PM

    Talk Track: Web Development with FastAPI

  • 03:00 PM - 04:30 PM

    Workshop: Data Science with Pandas

Day 2: Tuesday, May 13

  • 09:00 AM - 10:30 AM

    Talk Track: Machine Learning Best Practices

  • 11:00 AM - 12:30 PM

    Workshop: Testing and CI/CD

  • 01:30 PM - 03:00 PM

    Lightning Talks

  • 03:30 PM - 05:00 PM

    Closing Keynote & Awards

Venue

Convention Center

Location: San Francisco, California

Address: 747 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94103

Dates: May 12-13, 2025

Time: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Both Days)

The venue is easily accessible by public transportation and offers ample parking. Complimentary breakfast, lunch, and refreshments will be provided throughout the conference.

📍 San Francisco Convention Center

Interactive map would be displayed here

Register for PyCon 2025

Secure your spot at PyCon 2025 today! Early bird tickets are available at a special rate.

Early Bird

$199

  • ✓ Access to all talks and workshops
  • ✓ Conference materials
  • ✓ Meals and refreshments
  • ✓ Networking events

Standard

$299

  • ✓ Access to all talks and workshops
  • ✓ Conference materials
  • ✓ Meals and refreshments
  • ✓ Networking events
  • ✓ Premium seating

Student

$99

  • ✓ Access to all talks and workshops
  • ✓ Conference materials
  • ✓ Meals and refreshments
